For instance, a piece of art might be objectively well-crafted, but its beauty is enhanced by the emotional resonance it evokes in the viewer. Similarly, the beauty of a sunset can be appreciated universally, but the specific reasons why it is beautiful (such as colors, timing, or personal memories associated with it) are deeply personal. Given these factors, I place beautifulness at around 60 on this spectrum, acknowledging both its objective and subjective aspects.
